name: hours_pa_males
description: Average hours of prime-age males (j<jR) as share of time endowment; ENOE/OECD Mexico hours

name: vsl_usd
description: Value of a statistical life at reference age (2022 USD); Mexico benefit-transfer central ~2.0M

name: cross_elast_m
description: Cross-sectional (pooled) income elasticity of medical spending; UMIC anchor between aggregate-luxury and bias-corrected micro

name: mean_m_age_25_35
description: Phi-weighted mean of m for age periods j=2 and j=3 (model units); ENIGH medical share ~3.4% of consumption

name: logslope_m_25_75
description: OLS slope of log(mean m by age) on age-period index j=2..12; ~2-2.5%/yr life-cycle medical-spending growth

name: within_age_elast
description: Mass-weighted mean over working ages of within-age income elasticity of m; Newhouse/RAND micro range
